/usr/bin/ar qc liblibrhino.a CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/archive.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Audio.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Bitmap.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/BitmapArray.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Color.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/font_lookup.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Font.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/gl_misc.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Graphics.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/ini.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Input.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/misc.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/openres.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Plane.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Rect.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/RGSSError.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/RGSSReset.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/sdl_misc.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Sprite.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/surface_misc.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Table.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/tapir_config.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Tilemap.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Tone.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Viewport.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Win32APIFake.c.o CMakeFiles/librhino.dir/src/Window.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblibrhino.a
